No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus contains no direct or indirect evidence related to poverty eradication, social protection, or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: There is no evidence in the course description or objectives that relates to ending hunger, improving nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course's emphasis on 'self-reflection' and 'self-understanding' for personal development can be tenuously linked to promoting mental health and well-being (Target 3.4).
evidence: self-reflection on the purpose of the graduate study

Quality Education.reason: As an IMBA program, the course provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3), develops skills for careers (Target 4.4), and explicitly mentions 'sustainable development' (Target 4.7) as a core competence.
evidence: prepare you for the learning journey in the IMBA Program
sustainable development globally with Asia Characteristics

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to water, sanitation, hygiene, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content does not include any mention of energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Life Below Water.reason: The course syllabus provides no information related to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: There is no evidence in the course content pertaining to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, forests, or land degradation.
